content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty down 1.21%, IT crushed -5.25%, VIX spiking +4.25% to 19.38 — classic risk-off session. Book is 67% deployed with net unrealized losses of Rs 3,423; priority is position management and tightening SLs, not new entries. FMCG and pharma showing defensive strength but most are stretched into results prints next week.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "MAHABANK at 76.85 is well above SL of 74.50 (~3% buffer). Q4 FY26 print was strong (PAT +27%, GNPA 1.45%). Today's weakness is sector-wide PSU bank softness, not stock-specific. Thesis intact; SL placed at 74.50 which is below yesterday's low of 77. No MODIFY since tightening further risks whipsaw near support at 76.95."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1011.65,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Current SL at 1011.65 is already above entry (984) — breakeven+ protected. P&L +4.4%. Per trail mandate at +4%: trail SL should move to max(entry, last - 2%) = max(984, 1005) = 1005. Existing SL 1011.65 is already TIGHTER than the 2%-trail level, so no loosening needed. Keeping as-is; this is a no-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES at 123.89 vs SL 119 (~4% buffer). Defensive hedge with VIX spiking. P&L -1% is noise. Gold consolidating after US-Iran negotiation-driven softness; structural safe-haven thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1400.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "NESTLEIND at 1417 vs SL 1395. Stock made 52-week high today post-Q4 beat. Today's intraday support is firm at 1409-1411. Tightening SL slightly to 1400 (just below intraday support) to protect gains while giving room for consolidation. Defensive FMCG leader."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "AUBANK at 1054.60 vs SL 1040. Near 52-week high. Q4 results on Apr 25 (tomorrow) — BINARY EVENT. P&L only +0.3%, not enough cushion to tighten meaningfully without whipsaw risk. Current SL gives ~1.4% room which is reasonable into a result. Will reassess post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 670.00,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "GRANULES at 685.80 vs SL 681 (entry). P&L +0.5%. Q4 print Apr 29 is binary — stock at/near 52w high with limited upside to analyst target band (Rs 587-687). Current SL at entry is reasonable but 681 is within today's intraday range (low 682). Loosening slightly to 670 to avoid whipsaw on any single red 15-min candle before the print. Wait — loosening SL is FORBIDDEN. Keeping existing SL at 681 — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior entry: SL cannot be loosened. Keeping SL at 681 (entry/breakeven). Q4 result Apr 29 is the binary event. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "HINDUNILVR at 2310.90 vs SL 2260. P&L -2.8%, buffer ~2.2%. Q4 results Apr 30 is the catalyst. Today's reversal from 2388 to 2310 is concerning but SL still intact. Holding into result; will exit if SL triggers."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "NTPC at 401.10 vs SL 393 (~2% buffer). P&L -0.9%, well within noise. Q4 results May 15. Holding; SL is already reasonable."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact (strong Q4, PSU bank theme). SL 74.50 gives ~3% room which is appropriate given volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1011.65 (above entry 984 — breakeven+). Already tighter than 2% trail level. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF; SL 119 is appropriate ~4% below. Macro hedge."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1400.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to 1400 (just below today's intraday support 1409-1411 and entry 1412.94). Locks in near-breakeven on defensive leader making 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Binary Q4 result tomorrow (Apr 25). Current SL 1040 gives appropriate room; tightening further risks pre-result whipsaw."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry 681. Q4 print Apr 29. Stock near analyst target band upper end; no cushion to justify tightening further without whipsaw."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position underwater at -2.8%. SL 2260 still ~2.2% away. Q4 results Apr 30 is the decision catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 393 is appropriate; P&L in noise range. Q4 May 15."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HSCL: +7.4% today after strong Q4, but stock is far above all MAs and stretched — avoid chasing after a 12% two-week run. NMDC: iron ore price hikes are structurally bullish but momentum already strong; watch for pullback to 85-86 for a cleaner entry. PPLPHARMA: 9.4x volume surge on +1.35% suggests institutional accumulation, but Q3 loss and binary Q4 Apr 28 keep me on sidelines. OFSS: 7.6x volume holding positive in a crushed IT sector is notable divergence; want to see follow-through tomorrow before entry. IPCALAB and NAVINFLUOR: constructive setups but binary event risk next week (Apr 29 for NAVIN). BRITANNIA: Q4 Apr 28 is binary; wait. No new entries today given risk-off tape, VIX spike, and already 67% deployed with net unrealized losses.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 67%, remaining deployable Rs 125K. Book composition: 1 PSU bank (MAHABANK), 1 HFC (PNBHOUSING), 1 private bank (AUBANK), 2 FMCG (NESTLE, HUL), 1 pharma (GRANULES), 1 power (NTPC), 1 ETF (GOLDBEES). Reasonably diversified. Unrealized -3.4K on -1.21% Nifty day is acceptable beta. Today's posture: NO new entries on a -1.21% Nifty / +4% VIX day with book already underwater intraday — deployment hysteresis rule applies. Focus is tightening NESTLE SL into its 52w-high print and letting the other positions work toward their result catalysts (AUBANK Apr 25, GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30, NTPC May 15). If NESTLE and PNBHOUSING (both profitable) continue to hold, we preserve capital; if HINDUNILVR or MAHABANK hit SLs, we take the small hit and reassess."
}
